calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2005 Continued To Mar-21-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-21-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: R. Edwards/D. Carter, CSR: Joann Prior, CSR # 9129.
Richard Michael Lieberman, Esq., for Plaintiff: David Auskis (property Manager); Witness present, sworn and examined
No appearance by defendant

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Hank Hamilton as follows:
Principal $2,913.66
Damages $1,625.33
Costs $153.30 for a total of $3,066.96
Rental Agreement forfeited; restitution and possession of property at 1000 Sutter Street, # 421

Judgment to be submitted to this department.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-21-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES--RICHARD MICHAEL LIEBERMAN ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF THE GRANADA INC. DBA THE GRANADA, A CALIF. CORP.; HANK HAMILTON, DEFT. IN PRO PER, NOT PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFT. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN CASE CONT'D TO COURT TRIAL 3/21/05 IN RM 206.

JUDGE--OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE, CLERK PARAM NATT. (218)
